message:
Add safety checks to export engine and wire final_site_dir field

Export engine improvements:
- Detect when output path equals source database path (would corrupt data)
- Detect when output path is a directory instead of expected file
- Uses canonicalize() for path comparison to handle symlinks/relative paths

Config input changes:
- Initialize final_site_dir to None in to_export_options()
- Field was previously uninitialized, causing potential issues with
  downstream pages export logic

These guards prevent confusing error messages when users accidentally
specify the wrong output path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
